one_time_description: Earnings from investment in Kwa-wa-aineuk Timber Limited Partnership (modified equity method) - large non-recurring gain of $1,363,411 vs prior year loss of $256,657
economic_notes: Kwa-wa-aineuk Timber Limited Partnership and Kwa-wa-aineuk Timber GP Ltd. accounted for using modified equity method. Partnership had total revenue of $2,254,480 and net income of $1,363,511 for year ended December 31, 2020. Also holds investments in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP and related corporation at cost.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Large one-time earnings from Kwa-wa-aineuk Timber LP ($1,363,411) dominates results vs prior year loss of $256,657. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method with December 31 year-ends. Funds held in Ottawa Trust ($65,059) included in financial assets. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Social Development segment had only $1,188 revenue and no expenses. Capital Projects segment shows only amortization as expense with internal transfer. ISC funding per statement of operations is $480,227 total; by schedule breakdown: Administration $166,961 + Education $7,136 + Economic Dev $119,951 + Health $184,991 + Social Dev $1,188 = $480,227. Total government transfers include ISC $480,227 + Province of BC $50,446 + FNHA $11,000 = $541,673. OSR includes band revenue funds $487,837 + interest $842 + GBE earnings $1,363,411 = $1,852,090.
